name: CASCADE LAKES BREWERY RM27
address: 21175 SE REED MARKET ROAD, BEND, OR 97702

fr.recommendations: Enhancing emergency responder access and efficiency on the property could be achieved by ensuring the single access point is clearly marked and unobstructed. Expanding or reconfiguring pedestrian walkways might facilitate better movement for responders navigating between the building, parking area, and patio space. Maintaining clear visibility around these areas, especially by managing vegetation in the landscaped portions, may enhance emergency navigation and visibility. Providing additional rear access or improving current pathways could support responder staging and movement around the property. Clearly marked zones for responder staging in the vehicle parking area could allow efficient operational deployment during emergency situations.

wildfire.recommendations: Enhancing the separation between the structure and adjacent vegetation may improve defensible space and reduce exposure to potential fire spread. Preserving and possibly expanding the existing open fuel break could further interrupt the continuity of fuels, acting as a barrier to fire progression. Ongoing management of the vegetated perimeter, ensuring that combustible vegetation is kept at a safe distance from the structure, would support firefighter access and suppression activities. Maintaining open terrain areas around the property can contribute to effective defensible space. It is advisable to regularly inspect and manage vegetation within this perimeter to support long-term wildfire resilience and preparedness.
